style_effects: Gentle blue water droplets cling to Magmar's fur, slowly rising like bubbles before dissolving into the air; soft ripples spread outward from its body in concentric circles, reflecting a cool moonlight blue hue. A serene, translucent aura of pale aqua light emanates from its pores, casting a calming glow that illuminates the surrounding mist. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
